source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/기구/A1417MCW/한일산업/MI61-05121A_F1X_FRONT_CARBON 부품승인원.xlsx

document.title: PLATE-F1X_FRONT_CARBON 부품승인원
document.documentType: Part approval document with part specification, process quality control plan, packing method, outgoing inspection sheet, work instruction, and environmental substance content sections

sourceSummary.oneLine: Samsung Electronics part approval source for MI61-05121A, PLATE-F1X_FRONT_CARBON, supplied by 한일산업 for a 2G Detector model.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as a design-development output and supplier part approval record covering specifications, inspection criteria, process control, packing, storage, handling, quality assurance, MSDS, and environmental substance requirements.
keyPoints: Description is PLATE-F1X_FRONT_CARBON with SEC Code MI61-05121A, Model 2G Detector, Vendor 한일산업.
E.D DATE is 18-DEC-2018 and EC History lists Rev. 0.0 dated 2018.12.18 as First Issued.
Inspection items include appearance, width, length, machining, and X-ray inspection, all marked OK in the approval table.
The part must comply with substance thresholds specified in 0QA-2049 and must not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.
Control plan category is PV, with outgoing inspection covering appearance, dimensions, machining inspection, and packing.

entities.name: Samsung Electronics Co.
entities.evidence: This is the asset of Samsung Electronics Co. and it is prohibited from copying and application without permission.

entities.name: Health&Medical Equipment R&D 2 Group
entities.evidence: PROPOSAL DIVISION: Health&Medical Equipment R&D 2 Group

concepts.name: Part approval
concepts.evidence: Attached(Linked) File & Check List ... Part Specification ... Drawing ... Process Quality Control Plan ... Part Packing Method ... Outgoing Inspection Sheet (Vendor Sheet)

concepts.name: CFRP
concepts.evidence: CFRP 소재는 열팽장 계수가 작고,치수 안정성이 뛰어나고 전도성,진동 감쇠성,X선 투과성 이 뛰어나

concepts.name: Environmental substance threshold
concepts.evidence: Comply with the threshold of substances which are specified in 0QA-2049

concepts.name: Controlled substances prohibition
concepts.evidence: This parts should not contain any substances which are specified in 00Q2-0083K

concepts.name: Shipping LOT
concepts.evidence: Shipping LOT는 동일한 제조 사양, 동일 제조 공정, 동일 생산 라인, 거의 동일 시점에서 생산된 제품으로 이루어 져야 한다.

concepts.name: Quality assurance
concepts.evidence: CARBON PLATE의 제조공정에서는 완벽한 품질관리가 이루어져야 하고 치수규격 및 긁힘등 모든 항목과 CARBON PLATE의 제조과정은 전수 또는 Sampleing검사가 이루어져야 한다.

evidence.claim: The approved part description is PLATE-F1X_FRONT_CARBON and the SEC Code is MI61-05121A.
The document identifies the model as 2G Detector.
The vendor for the part is 한일산업.
The main issue date shown is 18-DEC-2018.
The EC history states Rev. 0.0 dated 2018.12.18 was First Issued.
The part approval inspection table marks appearance, width, length, machining, and X-ray inspection results as OK.
evidence.evidenceText: 외관 검사 ... OK; 치수 검사 - 폭 ... OK; 치수 검사 - 길이 ... OK; 가공 검사 ... OK; X-RAY 검사 ... OK

evidence.claim: The width inspection specification is 377.4 with tolerance +0.1,-0.2.
The length inspection specification is 453.4 with tolerance +0.1,-0.2.
X-ray inspection requires no foreign matter or bubbles in the X-ray image.
evidence.evidenceText: X-RAY 검사,,,,X-ray 촬영영상 으로 이물 및 기포 없을것

evidence.claim: The source requires compliance with substance thresholds specified in 0QA-2049.
evidence.evidenceText: Comply with the threshold of substances which are specified in 0QA-2049

evidence.claim: The part must not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.
evidence.evidenceText: This parts should not contain any substances which are specified in 00Q2-0083K

evidence.claim: The control plan category is PV.
evidence.evidenceText: Control Plan Category,,,,"□ DV, ■ PV , □ PR , □ SOP"

evidence.claim: The part name in the control plan is front_carbon.
The control plan includes SEC Part No. MI61-05121A.
Storage conditions are room temperature 23~25℃, humidity 35~75%RH, and warranty period within 6 months from manufacture date.
evidence.evidenceText: 보관 온도 상온 23~25℃; 보관 습도 35 ∼ 75%RH; 보증 기간 제조일로부터 6개월 이내

evidence.claim: Design, dimension, structure, or material changes to an approved part require prior change approval before application.
evidence.evidenceText: 승인을 득한 부품이 설계특성(외곽, 치수, 구조)또는 재질등의 변경 필요가 발생했을 경우에는 반드시 사전에 연락하여{변경점 사전승인}을 득(得)한 후에 적용하기로 한다.

reviewFlags.reason: No external regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified; authority fields reflect internal/company ownership and proposal division only.
The source is a supplier part approval and quality document, not a regulator-issued certificate or formal RA submission.
Page numbering is inconsistent in the preprocessed text, including Page 04 of 09/Page 04 of 11 and repeated Page 08/Page 09 sections, suggesting extraction or workbook-sheet noise.
Some metadata fields are blank in the source text, including Document Code, Revision on the first cover section, Material code, Old material code, Date(Orig.), Date(Rev.), and Date(Process Audit).
